chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5647 - وَ رَوَى اَلْبَزَنْطِيُّ عَنِ اَلْمُثَنَّى عَنِ اَلْحَسَنِ اَلصَّيْقَلِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لَهُ اِبْنُ أَخٍ وَ جَدٌّ قَالَ "اَلْمَالُ بَيْنَهُمَا نِصْفَانِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5647 - Al-Bazanti narrated from Al-Muthanna from Al-Hasan Al-Ṣayqal from Abu Abdullah (as) who said: I asked Imam (as) about a paternal nephew and a grandfather (regarding inheritance).
Imam (as) said: "The inheritance is divided equally between them, half and half."
